name: =?UTF-8?Q?Ronna=20McDaniel?=
subject: Donald Trump personally asked me:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
President Trump needs us now. |

Friend, President Donald Trump personally asked me to run the RNC, which is why I’m coming to you now. We may have won the election, but our fight is never over. He won because we never rested, we never gave up. And that’s the winning attitude we need to show every month to President Trump. As my first month as Chairwoman, we need to show the President we have the resources to fight back against the Democrat and mainstream media attacks that have already started. That’s why I’m asking you to help us hit our January goal with a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $25, $15, or even $5 right now. We all see how the mainstream media is treating President Trump. He is facing a never-ending onslaught of lies, attacks, and dirty tactics intended to divide us and distort his agenda. Those attacks didn’t work on the campaign, but if we don’t have the resources to continue to fight back, President Trump’s agenda will be in trouble, which is why we can’t let up one inch. We have to continue to stand with President Trump for the next eight years. That’s why I need your help to continue winning. I need your help to Make America Great Again! Please rush your contribution of $100, $65, $50, $25, $15 or even $5 to show you stand with President Trump before January 31 at 11:59 p.m. Thank you and God bless you, Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel Republican National Committee
CONTRIBUTE $100

Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecfba4RuQHPP~CIpWfaG1OtDRMN6aaaaNY2fBMI1EIea?p=6@x70AzA&Z=ik1dqgnn~2_lhfdq.Xth&q=W&2=
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of the Republican National Committee's online community. If you have any questions, concerns, or thoughts on the Republican Party, just click here to send us a message! If you'd like more information on the GOP platform or to volunteer, visit gop.com. Getting emails from the RNC is one of the best ways to stay up-to-date on our fight to take back the White House, but if you really want to scale back, click here to receive less email or click here to unsubscribe Or unsubscribe by email. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the GOP on Facebook, Twitter, and Instagram. Thank you for all that you do to help elect a conservative president.

That’s why I’m asking you to help us hit our January goal with a contribution of $100, $65, $50, $25, $15, or even $5 right now.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecfba4RuQHPP~CIpWfaG1OtDRMN6aaaaNY2fBMI1EIea?p=6@x70AzA&Z=ik1dqgnn~2_lhfdq.Xth&q=Y&2=&m=5w7462DmtisVDZthDefiDgfpsXm5nim5u5u5maDZDw&u5u

Please rush your contribution of $100, $65, $50, $25, $15 or even $5 to show you stand with President Trump before January 31 at 11:59 p.m.

name: Adam L., California Democrat
subject: Nobody can prepare for this
body:
Help me defend the ACA **Read why the Affordable Care Act matters to Adam*, and then say you're in to defend it:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Save-the-ACA1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170129_sup_nd&source=em_20170129_sup_nd")**
Fellow Democrat --

It's hard to be totally prepared to have your first child, but I was determined to do my best. My partner and I were responsible -- we saved, we planned, we made checklists, we called our insurance company to make sure our daughter would be insured from the moment she entered the world.

What we didn't plan for was for Maria to be born at 27 weeks and have to spend 7 weeks in the NICU.

But when that happened, I made the dreaded call to my insurance company to make sure that we weren't bankrupt when it was time to take our little girl home. And I was told that she wouldn't be covered because being born premature was considered a pre-existing condition.

A child, who had done nothing but come into the world early, was considered by insurance companies as nothing more than a liability. The Affordable Care Act was still fairly new when she was born, but I knew they could not deny my daughter coverage for pre-existing conditions -- so I called back at least eight or nine times until they finally agreed to provide coverage for her. It was a weight lifted off of our shoulders while we waited for her brain scans to come back to see if she had any brain damage from having been born prematurely.

Thanks to the ACA, Maria is now thriving in kindergarten. She is smart, funny, witty -- and truly the light of our lives. I cannot thank President Obama enough for giving our daughter a fighting chance. I can't even imagine how differently things could have gone had she not have had health insurance.

We are a middle-class family that works hard and expects no handouts from the government. Yet this situation could have deeply affected our daughter's life and destroyed our family's finances if not for the Affordable Care Act. Republicans talk a lot about the sanctity of life. But those same people are willing to let helpless babies potentially be denied lifesaving health care because being born early can somehow be considered a pre-existing condition -- and it just doesn't make any sense. It can happen to anyone, and it's only when it happens close to home when you realize how important access to lifesaving health care is.

**Will you stand with me in the fight to save the Affordable Care Act for the millions of Americans who depend on it for access to health care?**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Save-the-ACA1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170129_sup_nd&source=em_20170129_sup_nd")**

Thank you,

Adam L.
Los Angeles, CA
* At Adam's request, we've used pseudonyms for him and his daughter.

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c75d/4067b0a/23880df1c/7e7b3e21/3283514869/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170129_sup_nd&source=em_20170129_sup_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c75d/4067b0a/23880df1c/7e7b3e2e/3283514869/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170129_sup_nd&source=em_20170129_sup_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c75d/4067b0a/23880df1c/7e7b3e2f/3283514869/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170129_sup_nd&source=em_20170129_sup_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c75d/4067b0a/23880df1c/7e7b3e2c/3283514869/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170129_sup_nd&source=em_20170129_sup_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|

subject: There's never been a more important time to be a card-carrying Democrat
body:

name: Official DSCC Membership
subject: Tell Trump: THIS ENDS NOW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
The fight to stop the Trump administration's fringe agenda can't wait another minute. That's why we're coming to you with an urgent request...
---
[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20170129-OfficialMembership-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
Friend -- The fight to stop the Trump administration's fringe agenda can't wait another minute.

From attacks on Planned Parenthood and healthcare to unprecedented restrictions on refugees, the Trump White House has proven every bit as nightmarish as we feared. **We cannot let their shameful affronts to go unanswered any longer.**

[**Friend, that 's why we're counting on YOU to take the next step and help us fight back. Will you pitch in any amount to become an official 2017 member? We'll send a personalized card if you do.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20170129-OfficialMembership-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
| **[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20170129-OfficialMembership-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
---
[****](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20170129-OfficialMembership-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

We 've seen this week that Trump will stop at nothing to force his radical views on us.**It will take every ounce of grassroots Democratic support to turn the tide -- making your help the single most powerful weapon in our arsenal.**

**[So don't wait, Friend \-- now's the time! Pitch in a gift of ANY amount to become an Official 2017 DSCC member and get your personalized card! >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20170129-OfficialMembership-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thanks for standing up,
Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec5c/2b07114c/4790e097/7369c15a/3118644120/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec5c/2b07114c/4790e097/7369c155/3118644120/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ec5c/2b07114c/4790e097/7369c154/3118644120/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Democrats.org
subject: Donald doesn't want you to know you can still get covered
body:
The deadline to get covered is 1/31 **The open enrollment period for getting health insurance through the ACA's exchanges ends on January 31st. No matter what Trump says or does, you can still get covered for 2017.

** **[GET COVERED](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c754/4067b0a/2383d0d2c/7e7b2002/2783511964/VEsH/ "http://my.democrats.org/Get-Covered1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+GET+COVERED&utm_campaign=em_20170129_dnc3_full&source=em_20170129_dnc3_full")**
[](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c754/4067b0a/2383d0d2c/7e7b2003/2783511964/VEsE/ "http://my.democrats.org/Get-Covered1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20170129_dnc3_full&source=em_20170129_dnc3_full") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c754/4067b0a/2383d0d2c/7e7b2000/2783511964/VEsF/ "http://my.democrats.org/Get-Covered1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em_20170129_dnc3_full&source=em_20170129_dnc3_full") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c754/4067b0a/2383d0d2c/7e7b2001/2783511964/VEsC/ "http://my.democrats.org/Get-Covered1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=em_20170129_dnc3_full&source=em_20170129_dnc3_full") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c754/4067b0a/2383d0d2c/7e7b200e/2783511964/VEsD/ "http://my.democrats.org/Get-Covered1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=em_20170129_dnc3_full&source=em_20170129_dnc3_full") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c754/4067b0a/2383d0d2c/7e7b200f/2783511964/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/Get-Covered1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=em_20170129_dnc3_full&source=em_20170129_dnc3_full") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c754/4067b0a/2383d0d2c/7e7b200c/2783511964/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/Get-Covered1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7&utm_campaign=em_20170129_dnc3_full&source=em_20170129_dnc3_full") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c754/4067b0a/2383d0d2c/7e7b200d/2783511964/VEsO/ "http://my.democrats.org/Get-Covered1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8&utm_campaign=em_20170129_dnc3_full&source=em_20170129_dnc3_full") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c754/4067b0a/2383d0d2c/7e7b200a/2783511964/VEsP/ "http://my.democrats.org/Get-Covered1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9&utm_campaign=em_20170129_dnc3_full&source=em_20170129_dnc3_full")
**[http://my.democrats.org/Get-Covered](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c754/4067b0a/2383d0d2c/7e7b200b/2783511964/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/Get-Covered1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+httpmydemocratsorgGetCovered&utm_campaign=em_20170129_dnc3_full&source=em_20170129_dnc3_full")**

---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c754/4067b0a/2383d0d2c/7e7b2008/2783511964/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170129_dnc3_full&source=em_20170129_dnc3_full"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c754/4067b0a/2383d0d2c/7e7b2009/2783511964/VEsHBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170129_dnc3_full&source=em_20170129_dnc3_full"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c754/4067b0a/2383d0d2c/7e7b2016/2783511964/VEsHBg/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170129_dnc3_full&source=em_20170129_dnc3_full") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c754/4067b0a/2383d0d2c/7e7b2017/2783511964/VEsHAQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170129_dnc3_full&source=em_20170129_dnc3_full"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

|
